---
title: "knight_intro"
format: revealjs
editor: source
---

##  {background-video="media/zach_i_am_zach_field_caption.mp4" background-size="cover"}

::: notes
Melvin: And what have you been sent to do?
:::

##  {background-video="media/zach_reasons_captions.mp4" background-size="cover"}

::: notes
Melvin: That seems very old fashioned - I'm sure they kidnap princes too
:::

##  {background-video="media/zach-only_kidnap_princesses_caption.mp4" background-size="cover"}

::: notes
Melvin: I'd better see what the dragons have to say about this.
:::

##  {background-video="media/arlo_stop_zach_caption.mp4" background-size="cover"}

::: notes
Melvin: Oh dear oh dear. I must save the dragons. Let's look at those plots again ...
:::
